rows.label: tlk47100062_01_msg0001
rows.name:
Well, I went back to the village,
but Mimi really wanted me to come
over for a bite of grass.

rows.label: tlk47100062_01_msg0002
rows.name:
The Demon King is no more, so
it's safe for us to travel
back and forth in peace now.

rows.label: tlk47100062_01_msg0003
rows.name:
Thanks to Uka, the true
hero, we can eat delicious
grass. Thank you so much!
